meta.title: AI Chat Exporter for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity
meta.description: Install AI Chat Exporter to save ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity conversations as PDF, Markdown, Text, JSON, and polished screenshots with local-first privacy.

nav.badge: Local-first exports for AI power users

hero.title: Turn AI chats into polished exports your team can keep, share, and trust.
hero.description: Save ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity conversations as PDF, Markdown, Text, JSON, or crisp screenshots in seconds. Export full threads or just the messages you need, all with local-first privacy.
badges: Export full conversations or selected messages
Copy every code block in one click
hero.previewPrivacy: Local processing only. No chat content sent to external servers.

problem.title: Great AI conversations disappear fast.
problem.description: Teams, founders, researchers, and developers rely on AI chats every day, but the best answers stay locked inside chat windows. Saving them cleanly is still frustrating.

items.title: Important answers get buried
items.description: High-value prompts, decisions, and summaries vanish into long threads that are hard to revisit later.

items.title: Sharing is messy
items.description: Copy-pasting into docs breaks formatting, loses context, and wastes time when you need something presentable.

items.title: Code gets lost in the thread
items.description: Developers often need every code block from a session, not a manual scavenger hunt through dozens of messages.

features.title: Everything you need to save AI chats the right way.
features.description: Built for people who treat AI conversations like real working assets, not temporary tabs.

items.title: Export in multiple formats
items.description: Export to PDF, Markdown, Text, and JSON for docs, archives, handoffs, and knowledge bases.
items.detail: Choose a full conversation or export only selected messages.

items.title: Beautiful chat screenshots
items.description: Capture clean, presentation-ready screenshots without cluttered browser chrome or messy crop work.
items.detail: Perfect for tutorials, support docs, client updates, and social posts.

items.title: Code block extraction
items.description: Pull every code block from a conversation into one clean output that is ready to copy and reuse.
items.detail: Ideal for debugging sessions, prototypes, and developer handoffs.

items.title: Multi-AI support
items.description: Use the same export workflow across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
items.detail: Fast local processing keeps sensitive chats private and under your control.

how.title: Three steps from chat to export.

items.title: Install the extension
items.description: Add AI Chat Exporter from the Chrome Web Store and pin it to your browser.

items.title: Open your AI chat
items.description: Go to ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, or Perplexity and open any conversation you want to save.

items.title: Click export
items.description: Choose the output you need, including PDF, Markdown, Text, JSON, screenshots, or extracted code.

supported.title: One workflow across the AI tools your team already uses.
supported.description: No more remembering different export tricks on every platform.

items.name: ChatGPT
items.description: Save prompt libraries, research threads, and polished summaries.

items.name: Gemini
items.description: Keep planning sessions, notes, and document-ready exports organized.

items.name: Claude
items.description: Archive long-form strategy, writing, and analysis conversations cleanly.

items.name: Perplexity
items.description: Capture sourced answers and search-driven chats for later reference.

privacy.title: Built for sensitive workflows, not just flashy exports.
privacy.description: AI Chat Exporter is designed for people who care about privacy, control, and clean output quality at the same time.

items.title: Local-first processing
items.description: Your raw chat content stays on your device during the export flow instead of being pushed to external servers.

items.title: Made for real work
items.description: Use it for research notes, product decisions, support logs, and developer conversations without the usual export friction.

items.title: Simple, transparent workflow
items.description: Open a chat, pick what you want, and export. No forced cloud sync and no confusing extra steps.

privacy.visualDescription: Select, export, and share the result when you want to. The original conversation stays in your browser during processing.

demo.title: Exports that already look ready before you touch them.
demo.description: Turn messy chat windows into files and visuals you can store, share, or drop into your workflow immediately.

items.label: PDF

items.description: Structured pages for briefings, reports, training docs, and archives.

codeCard.title: Copy every code block in seconds

pricing.title: Start free, upgrade when you need more power.

items.question: Which AI platforms are supported?
items.answer: AI Chat Exporter works with ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.

items.question: Does the extension upload my conversations anywhere?
items.answer: No. The core export flow is local-first, so your chat content stays on your device during processing.

items.question: Can I export only part of a conversation?
items.answer: Yes. You can export an entire thread or choose selected messages when you only need the important parts.

items.question: What formats can I export to?
items.answer: Depending on your plan, you can export chats to Markdown, Text, PDF, JSON, and visual screenshots.

items.question: Who is this built for?
items.answer: It is designed for founders, researchers, teams, support operators, creators, and developers who want to keep high-value AI conversations.
